what_is_working: Edit this section to summarize the strongest creative patterns this week. What formats are driving GMV? What hooks are retaining viewers? 2-3 sentences grounded in your top ads.

patterns.name: Before & After Relief
patterns.description: Creator shows jaw pain or tension before using the device, then visible relief after consistent use. Strong emotional payoff drives share and save behavior.

patterns.name: Authority Endorsement
patterns.description: Dentist, specialist, or medical professional recommends the device. Builds trust quickly and lowers purchase hesitation.

patterns.name: Lifestyle Integration
patterns.description: Device appears naturally in a morning or evening routine — not as the hero, but as a seamless habit. Relatability drives link clicks.
